privacyPolicy.title: Privacy Policy
privacyPolicy.intro: This Privacy Policy explains how Dent Luna collects, uses, stores, and protects information when you visit our website or contact us about dental treatments.
privacyPolicy.metaDesc: Read how Dent Luna collects, uses, stores, and protects personal information for website visitors and patients.

collect.heading: Information We Collect
collect.p1: Dent Luna may collect personal information that you choose to share with us through contact forms, consultation requests, WhatsApp, email, or other direct communication channels.
collect.i1: Your name, phone number, and email address
collect.i2: Treatment interests, travel preferences, and appointment details
collect.i3: Medical or dental information you voluntarily provide for consultation purposes
collect.i4: Basic website usage data such as device, browser, and analytics information

use.heading: How We Use Your Information
use.p1: We use the information we collect to respond to your inquiries, organize consultations, coordinate treatment planning, and improve our treatments.
use.i1: To contact you about your request or appointment
use.i2: To prepare treatment recommendations and quotations
use.i3: To manage website operations, analytics, and quality of care
use.i4: To comply with legal, tax, medical, or regulatory obligations where applicable

share.heading: Sharing of Data
share.p1: We do not sell your personal data. We only share information when it is necessary to operate the business and deliver the treatments you requested.
share.i1: With dentists, clinics, laboratories, or care coordinators involved in your treatment journey
share.i2: With trusted service providers such as CRM, hosting, analytics, or email platforms
share.i3: With authorities when disclosure is required by law or to protect legal rights

retain.heading: Data Retention and Security
retain.p1: We retain personal information only for as long as reasonably necessary for consultation management, treatment coordination, legal compliance, and business recordkeeping.
retain.p2: Dent Luna uses reasonable technical and organizational measures to protect your information, but no method of storage or transmission can be guaranteed as completely secure.

rights.heading: Your Rights
rights.p1: Depending on your location, you may have rights to request access to, correction of, or deletion of your personal data, or to object to certain uses of that data.
rights.p2: To make a privacy-related request, please contact us directly through the contact details published on this website.

termsAndConditions.title: Terms and Conditions
termsAndConditions.intro: These Terms and Conditions govern your use of the Dent Luna website and your interaction with us through online forms, inquiries, and consultation requests.
termsAndConditions.metaDesc: Review the terms that govern the use of the Dent Luna website and treatment inquiries.

website.heading: Use of This Website
website.p1: This website is provided for general information about Dent Luna, our treatments, and how prospective patients may contact us. The content on this website does not constitute medical advice, diagnosis, or a guaranteed treatment outcome.
website.p2: By using this website, you agree to use it lawfully and not to interfere with its operation, security, or availability.

consultation.heading: Consultations and Treatment Information
consultation.p1: Initial information, treatment suggestions, and price estimates shared through the website, forms, email, or messaging platforms are indicative only and may change after clinical review, imaging, examination, or updated treatment planning.
consultation.i1: Treatment plans are subject to medical suitability and professional evaluation
consultation.i2: Quoted prices may change if case scope, materials, or treatment timing changes
consultation.i3: Travel, accommodation, and treatment schedules remain subject to availability

thirdParty.heading: Appointments, Travel, and Third Parties
thirdParty.p1: Where Dent Luna helps coordinate appointments, travel planning, transfers, accommodation, or related treatments, those arrangements may involve third-party providers. Dent Luna is not responsible for the acts, omissions, delays, pricing, or policies of independent third parties.

ip.heading: Intellectual Property
ip.p1: Unless otherwise stated, the text, branding, design elements, and content on this website are the property of Dent Luna or used with permission. You may not reproduce, republish, distribute, or commercially exploit any part of the site without prior written consent.

liability.heading: Liability
liability.p1: Dent Luna makes reasonable efforts to keep website information accurate and up to date, but does not guarantee completeness, availability, or error-free operation.
liability.p2: To the fullest extent permitted by law, Dent Luna is not liable for indirect, incidental, or consequential loss arising from use of this website or reliance on website content.

changes.heading: Changes to These Terms
changes.p1: We may update these Terms and Conditions from time to time to reflect business, legal, or operational changes. Continued use of the website after changes are published means you accept the updated terms.

treatmentsHome.heading: Our Treatments
treatmentsHome.subheading: Advanced Dental Solutions Designed for You
treatmentsHome.description: From routine cleanings to complex restorations, our comprehensive dental treatments are tailored to meet your unique needs and ensure a healthy, radiant smile.
treatmentsHome.veneersDesc: Achieve a brighter, more confident smile
treatmentsHome.fullMouthDesc: Comprehensive solutions for complex dental cases
treatmentsHome.implantsDesc: Permanent and reliable solution for missing teeth

howItWorks.heading: Simple, Fast, and Organized Process
howItWorks.description: Our intuitive platform streamlines your workflow, keeping everything organized and accessible in one place. Experience the ease of managing your projects with our simple, fast, and efficient process.
howItWorks.step1Desc: Easily upload your dental photos or X-rays through our secure platform. Our team will review them to provide you with a personalized treatment plan and accurate cost estimate.
howItWorks.step2Desc: Receive a detailed treatment plan tailored to your needs, including step-by-step instructions and a clear cost estimate.
howItWorks.step3Desc: Coordinate your travel arrangements with ease. Our platform helps you plan your trip efficiently, ensuring a smooth experience from start to finish.
howItWorks.step4Desc: Receive your treatment with the guidance of our expert team, ensuring a smooth and effective process.
howItWorks.step5Desc: Receive ongoing support and guidance to ensure the long-term success of your treatment.

whyUsHome.heading: More Than Just Treatment — A Complete Experience
whyUsHome.description: At Dent Luna, we go beyond traditional dental care. We offer a comprehensive experience that includes personalized treatment plans, expert guidance, and ongoing support to ensure your smile transformation is not just successful but also enjoyable.

testimonialHome.label: Testimonials
testimonialHome.heading: What Our Patients Say
testimonialHome.t1Content: I came from London for veneers and couldn't be happier. The whole process was seamless from start to finish.
testimonialHome.t2Content: DentLuna arranged everything for me — hotel, transfers, appointments. The result exceeded all my expectations.
testimonialHome.t3Content: Had my implants done here after years of searching. The quality and price compared to the UK is unbelievable.
testimonialHome.t4Content: The dentists were incredibly professional and spoke perfect English. I felt completely at ease throughout.
testimonialHome.t5Content: My smile has been completely transformed. I get compliments every day and I'm so glad I chose DentLuna.
testimonialHome.t6Content: From the first consultation to the last follow-up, the communication was excellent. Highly recommend.
testimonialHome.t7Content: I was nervous about travelling abroad for dental work but DentLuna made everything so easy. The results are stunning.
testimonialHome.t8Content: Absolutely world-class care. The clinic is spotless, the staff are warm and the results speak for themselves.
testimonialHome.t9Content: I had a full smile makeover and saved thousands compared to back home. I wish I had done this sooner.

ctaHome.heading: Start Your Smile Transformation Today
ctaHome.description: Get your free consultation and discover the best treatment option for you.

aboutHero.label: About Dent Luna
aboutHero.heading: Premium Dental Care in Izmir for International Patients
aboutHero.description: We help you achieve a healthy, natural smile through expert treatment and a carefully organized experience from start to finish.

aboutContent.intro1: Dent Luna is a specialized provider of advanced dental treatments for international patients.
aboutContent.intro2: Based in Izmir, we work with experienced dentists and modern clinics to deliver high-quality, reliable, and aesthetic results.
aboutContent.mission: To make your dental treatment abroad clear, safe, and stress-free.
aboutContent.approachText: We believe great results come from proper planning and honest communication.
aboutContent.processLabel: Every patient follows a structured process:
aboutContent.process1: Evaluation based on your photos or X-rays
aboutContent.process2: Personalized treatment plan prepared by dentists
aboutContent.process3: Clear explanation of procedures, timing, and pricing
aboutContent.process4: Efficient scheduling to minimize your stay
aboutContent.processOutro: This approach ensures predictable results and a smooth experience.

qualityMaterials.heading: QUALITY & MATERIALS
qualityMaterials.text1: We use only high-quality materials from internationally recognized manufacturers, all meeting strict European and global standards.
qualityMaterials.text2: We work with leading dental brands from Germany, Switzerland, the United States, and South Korea — allowing us to choose the most suitable option for each patient.
qualityMaterials.text3: Every material is <bold>fully traceable</bold>, ensuring safety, consistency, and long-term success.

whyIzmir.heading: WHY IZMIR?
whyIzmir.intro: Izmir is one of the most preferred cities for dental treatments, offering:
whyIzmir.item1: World-class dental clinics with state-of-the-art technology.
whyIzmir.item2: Highly skilled dentists with international experience.
whyIzmir.item3: Affordable treatment options without compromising quality.
whyIzmir.item4: A vibrant city with rich culture and beautiful coastal views.
whyIzmir.outro: Experience top-tier dental care in a city that combines medical excellence with an unforgettable travel experience.

whyChooseUs.heading: WHY PATIENTS CHOOSE US
whyChooseUs.description: At DentLuna, we are committed to providing exceptional dental care that combines advanced technology, personalized treatment plans, and a compassionate approach. Our patients choose us for our dedication to their oral health, our experienced team of dental professionals, and our welcoming environment that prioritizes comfort and trust.
whyChooseUs.feature1Desc: Our team of dental professionals is highly skilled and experienced.
whyChooseUs.feature2Desc: We use the latest dental technology to provide the best care.
whyChooseUs.feature3Desc: Our clinics are designed to make patients feel at ease.
whyChooseUs.feature4Desc: We provide individualized treatment plans to meet each patient's unique needs.
whyChooseUs.feature5Desc: We provide timely and effective dental treatments.
whyChooseUs.feature6Desc: We prioritize patient safety and adhere to the highest standards of dental care.
whyChooseUs.feature7Desc: We offer comprehensive aftercare and support to ensure long-term dental health.
whyChooseUs.feature8Desc: We offer multilingual support to cater to patients from diverse backgrounds.
